title: Add Extended Fields to Batch Import
why: The Khai báo Hàng loạt API didn't support the new extended fields added to Stock Sync, resulting in fragmented data ingestion capabilities
root_cause: excel.service.ts was strictly parsing only the old columns
solution: Added mapping for KÍCH THƯỚC, ĐƠN VỊ BÁN, K.THƯỚC Đ.VỊ, GIÁ/ĐV in processImport, updated the template generation, and updated the UI hint to reflect the new structure
prevention: When adding new fields to a domain, check all ingestion vectors (multiple upload points) to ensure parity
